querySets.name: recipes
querySets.bulkSql: SELECT id, title FROM recipe_catalog WHERE (is_active IS NULL OR is_active = true) AND title IS NOT NULL
querySets.incrementalSql: SELECT id, title FROM recipe_catalog WHERE (is_active IS NULL OR is_active = true) AND title IS NOT NULL AND created_at > $1

querySets.name: kitchen-products
querySets.bulkSql: SELECT slug FROM kitchen_products WHERE is_active = true AND slug IS NOT NULL
querySets.incrementalSql: SELECT slug FROM kitchen_products WHERE is_active = true AND slug IS NOT NULL AND (updated_at > $1 OR created_at > $1)

querySets.name: kitchen-categories
querySets.bulkSql: SELECT slug FROM kitchen_categories WHERE COALESCE(is_active, TRUE) = TRUE AND slug IS NOT NULL

querySets.name: recipe-categories
querySets.bulkSql: SELECT DISTINCT category AS slug FROM recipe_catalog WHERE category IS NOT NULL AND category != '' AND is_active = TRUE

querySets.name: recipe-cuisines
querySets.bulkSql: SELECT cuisine AS slug FROM recipe_catalog WHERE is_active = TRUE AND cuisine IS NOT NULL GROUP BY cuisine HAVING COUNT(*) >= 10

querySets.name: blog-articles
querySets.bulkSql: SELECT slug FROM editorial_articles WHERE status = 'published' AND slug IS NOT NULL
querySets.incrementalSql: SELECT slug FROM editorial_articles WHERE status = 'published' AND slug IS NOT NULL AND (updated_at > $1 OR COALESCE(published_at, '1970-01-01'::timestamptz) > $1)

querySets.name: products
querySets.bulkSql: SELECT asin AS slug FROM products WHERE site_id IN ($SITE_IDS) AND is_active = true AND COALESCE(category_confidence, 0) >= 0.5 AND asin IS NOT NULL
querySets.incrementalSql: SELECT asin AS slug FROM products WHERE site_id IN ($SITE_IDS) AND is_active = true AND COALESCE(category_confidence, 0) >= 0.5 AND asin IS NOT NULL AND (updated_at > $1 OR created_at > $1)

querySets.name: articles
querySets.bulkSql: SELECT slug FROM articles WHERE site_id IN ($SITE_IDS) AND is_published = true AND slug IS NOT NULL
querySets.incrementalSql: SELECT slug FROM articles WHERE site_id IN ($SITE_IDS) AND is_published = true AND slug IS NOT NULL AND (updated_at > $1 OR created_at > $1)

querySets.name: categories
querySets.bulkSql: SELECT DISTINCT slug FROM categories WHERE site_id IN ($SITE_IDS) AND is_active = true AND slug IS NOT NULL

querySets.name: buying-guides
querySets.bulkSql: SELECT DISTINCT slug FROM categories WHERE site_id IN ($SITE_IDS) AND is_active = true AND slug IS NOT NULL

querySets.name: brands
querySets.bulkSql: SELECT slug FROM brands WHERE site_id IN ($SITE_IDS) AND product_count > 0 AND slug IS NOT NULL
querySets.incrementalSql: SELECT slug FROM brands WHERE site_id IN ($SITE_IDS) AND product_count > 0 AND slug IS NOT NULL AND (updated_at > $1 OR created_at > $1)

querySets.name: reviews
querySets.bulkSql: SELECT slug FROM editorial_articles WHERE status = 'published' AND slug IS NOT NULL
querySets.incrementalSql: SELECT slug FROM editorial_articles WHERE status = 'published' AND slug IS NOT NULL AND (updated_at > $1 OR COALESCE(published_at, '1970-01-01'::timestamptz) > $1)

querySets.name: benchmarks
querySets.bulkSql: SELECT slug FROM hardware_specs WHERE slug IS NOT NULL
querySets.incrementalSql: SELECT slug FROM hardware_specs WHERE slug IS NOT NULL AND updated_at > $1

querySets.name: trending-comparisons
querySets.bulkSql: SELECT left_ref, right_ref FROM trending_comparisons WHERE is_active = true AND kind = 'product'
querySets.incrementalSql: SELECT left_ref, right_ref FROM trending_comparisons WHERE is_active = true AND kind = 'product' AND last_seen_at > $1
querySets._comment: URL is /compare/<left>-vs-<right> (matches sitemap canonical). The /vs/<left>/<right> alias also serves 200 but its canonical points to homepage, so Bing/Google would discard those submissions.

querySets.name: retro-marketplace-categories
querySets.bulkSql: SELECT DISTINCT slug FROM categories WHERE site_id = 'retro-gaming' AND is_active = true AND slug IS NOT NULL
